videos.title: Python Variables for Beginners — Corey Schafer
videos.description: Clear, structured walkthrough of Python variables, types, and naming conventions — one of the most-watched Python tutorials.

videos.title: How Python Variables Work (Memory Model Explained)
videos.description: Explains the CPython name → object model, reference counting, id(), and the difference between mutable and immutable objects.

videos.title: Python Scoping & Closures (LEGB Rule)
videos.description: Deep dive into Python scoping with practical examples of local, enclosing, global, and built-in namespaces.
